info.description:
AI-powered database operations with strongly typed API and bulk operations

## Key Features
- **Bulk Operations**: Process 10K+ items with automatic batching
- **Transaction Control**: Three modes (auto_batch, single, explicit)
- **Type Safety**: Strongly typed request/response structures
- **LLM Integration**: Compatible with function calling and text tools
info.title: SOP Agent API
